notes:
A3/Ledger, 32 pages A4/Letter per minute, PCL 6, and PostScript Level 3, 32 MB (288 MB max.), one tray for 500 sheets (more trays can be added), 100-sheet multi-purpose tray, parallel, ethernet.

Best results are probably obtained when the printer is used in PostScript mode with a PPD file from the printer's driver CD.

You can also get an RPM with the PPD file from Brother.

Consumables/Refills: Separate Toner and Drum
